targetArea: VCPChat renderer UI / Codex Router toggle
issueReported: Codex Router UI prompts should be Chinese.
When the toggle is not visibly enabled, ordinary messages could not be sent.
rootCause: The toggle mode decision used persisted codexRouterModeEnabled state directly. If localStorage retained enabled while the button was visually off/unavailable, ordinary sends could still be captured by the Router path.

activeRouterModeRequires: codexRouterHostClient.run available in the current window
fix.fallbackBehavior: If the current message is not explicitly prefixed and Router host is unavailable, the persisted toggle is cleared and ordinary VCPChat send continues.
fix.explicitPrefixBehavior: /codex-router and /codex-task still intentionally require the Router host and report an error if unavailable.
fix.localization: Toggle title/toast/error/success messages are now Chinese.

notValidated: No automated Electron click/send test was run; user should retry ordinary send with the toggle off in the live window.
